label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage is about computers and the Kurzweil Reading Machine. The question asks which of the four options is true based on the text. First, I'll go through each option one by one. Option A says "Computers can solve all the problems people can't do." The passage mentions that computers can solve difficult problems and control other machines, but it doesn't say they can solve ALL problems that people can't do. So A might be too extreme and probably not correct. Option B claims "Large computers can only solve one problem at a time." But the passage states that scientists use large computers to solve many problems at the same time. So B is directly contradicted by the text—large computers can handle multiple problems, so B is false. Option C: "When using the Kurzweil machine, a blind man needn't do anything."
